tagline: We Build More Than Pools — We Build Backyard Dreams

hero.headline: Your Dream Backyard Starts Right Here
hero.subheadline: For 28 years, Michigan families have trusted Dolphin Pool & Spa to design and build custom inground pools that transform ordinary backyards into extraordinary gathering spaces. Jeff and the team handle every detail so you can focus on making memories.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Custom Pool Solutions Built<br class="hidden md:block"> for Michigan Living
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to the final splash, Dolphin Pool & Spa handles every phase of your pool project with the care and craftsmanship only a family-owned builder can deliver.

cards.title: Custom Inground Pools
cards.description: Custom-designed steel-walled vinyl-liner inground pools built specifically for Northern Michigan homes. Each pool is tailored to your backyard, lifestyle, and vision with premium materials.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Repair
cards.description: Comprehensive renovation and repair services to restore, upgrade, or completely transform your existing pool. From liner replacements to full remodels, we bring aging pools back to life.

cards.title: Spas & Swim Spas
cards.description: Year-round relaxation with hot tubs, spas, and swim spas. Expert guidance on selecting the perfect spa to complement your outdoor living space and extend your swim season.

cards.title: Pool Upgrades & Features
cards.description: Lighting, water features, automation systems, premium decking, and more. Elevate your existing pool with upgrades that make every swim feel like a resort experience.

cards.title: Pool Design & Planning
cards.description: Full-service design and planning from concept to completion. We collaborate with you to ensure your custom pool perfectly fits your property, lifestyle, and budget.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Construction
cards.description: Professional commercial pool construction for businesses, communities, and organizations throughout Central and Northern Michigan. Built to code, built to last.

how_it_works.headline: Your Pool Journey in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your dream backyard. Jeff will visit your property for a free on-site consultation, discuss your ideas, and create a custom design tailored to your space and budget.

steps.title: We Build Your Dream
steps.description: Our experienced crew handles every detail — excavation, steel walls, plumbing, electrical, decking, and finishing. Jeff personally oversees each phase to ensure quality at every step.

steps.title: Dive Into Your New Life
steps.description: Your custom pool is ready for its first splash. We walk you through everything, provide ongoing support, and make sure your backyard becomes the gathering place you always imagined.

about.label: Why Michigan Families Choose Us
about.headline: We're Not Just Pool Builders — We're Your Neighbors
about.description: Family-owned and operated since 1998, Dolphin Pool & Spa has been building custom inground pools across Central and Northern Michigan for over 28 years. Owner Jeff leads every project with the same values that built this company: respect, honesty, passion, and attention to detail. Most of our business comes from repeat customers and referrals — because when you treat every backyard like your own, word gets around.

features.title: Owner-Led, Hands-On Projects
features.description: Jeff personally oversees every build from design to completion. You'll never be handed off to a stranger — the owner is your point of contact.

features.title: Built for Northern Michigan
features.description: Our steel-walled vinyl-liner pools are specifically engineered for Michigan's climate, soil conditions, and freeze-thaw cycles. We know this terrain.

features.title: Referral-Built Reputation
features.description: A majority of our clients come from referrals and repeat business. Our 5.0 Google rating across 64 reviews speaks to the relationships we build.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool project is unique. We provide detailed, honest estimates so you know exactly what you're investing in — no hidden fees, no change-order games.

guarantee.headline: Our "Backyard Dreams" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any aspect of your pool project doesn't meet your expectations, we'll make it right — period. Jeff personally stands behind every pool we build. From the first consultation to years after your pool is complete, Dolphin Pool & Spa is here for you. That's not a policy — that's a promise from a family business that stakes its name on every project.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom inground pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom inground pools take 6-10 weeks from groundbreaking to completion, depending on the design complexity and weather conditions. We'll give you a detailed timeline during your free consultation so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: Do you only build vinyl-liner pools?
faqs.answer: We specialize in custom steel-walled vinyl-liner inground pools because they offer the best value, durability, and design flexibility for Northern Michigan homes. We'll explain the advantages during your consultation and help you choose what's right for your property.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Michigan?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Central and Northern Michigan, including Harrison, Clare, Midland, Mt. Pleasant, Beulah, Lewiston, Williamsburg, and surrounding communities. If you're not sure whether we cover your area, just give Jeff a call.

faqs.question: Can you remodel or repair my existing pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle everything from vinyl liner replacements to complete pool renovations. Whether your pool needs a refresh or a total transformation, we'll assess the situation and give you honest recommendations.

faqs.question: What makes Dolphin Pool & Spa different from other builders?
faqs.answer: We're a family-owned company where the owner, Jeff, is personally involved in every project. With 28 years of experience, a perfect 5.0 Google rating, and most business coming from referrals, our reputation is built on relationships — not advertising.

testimonials.name: Kathy M.
testimonials.text: Jeff and his crew did an amazing job transforming our backyard into a resort-like spa. The attention to detail was incredible, and Jeff was always available to answer our questions. We couldn't be happier.

testimonials.name: Megan B.
testimonials.text: Jeff and his team did a fantastic job on our inground pool. They were very kind, professional, and reasonably priced. The whole process was smooth from start to finish. Highly recommend Dolphin Pool & Spa.

testimonials.name: Christine N.
testimonials.text: Excellent service! Very knowledgeable and prompt. The estimate was accurate with no surprise costs, and the work was completed on time. Would highly recommend Jeff and his team to anyone.

contact.subtitle: Schedule a free on-site consultation with Jeff. No pressure, no obligations — just honest advice from a builder who's been doing this for 28 years.
